releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This release updates how WASM binaries are loaded into the plugin.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This release addresses issues that were raised by the Obsidian team in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/3651#

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is the first release of obsidian-multiplatform-highlights-import.

It currently supports extracting from Kobo and Apple Books. Books are reconciled so that one note is created per book, even if the same book is read on multiple services.
